response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio matches the provided lyrics for 'Diva' and 'Dancing Reed' perfectly.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the provided lyrics for both songs to ensure accurate transcription and translation. Hand-transcribed and translated the final talk segment from 04:24.000 to the end, where Tokino Sora talks about her songs and addresses the hashtag reading.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed both songs tightly to vocal onsets and offsets. Added a subtitle for the on-screen song credit of 'Dancing Reed' to ensure completeness. Corrected a typo in the timestamp for 'Kimi no hyoujou wa...' to 02:56.500. The spoken segment at the end is timed precisely to Tokino Sora's fast-paced delivery.

subtitles.original: 行き止まりばっか足が竦んで 立てないよ
subtitles.english: My feet freeze at every dead end, I can't even stand

subtitles.original: 音のない世界から君を見つけて 連れ出すんだ
subtitles.english: I'll find you in this soundless world and take you away

subtitles.original: 言葉紡いで唄うことが わたしの運命だ
subtitles.english: Weaving words and singing is my destiny

subtitles.original: 世界にありふれた虚しささえも 上書きして
subtitles.english: Overwriting even the emptiness so common in this world

subtitles.original: 路地裏に咲いた花のように 願いを照らす
subtitles.english: Like a flower blooming in a back alley, illuminating wishes

subtitles.original: 小さな光に憧れて
subtitles.english: Yearning for that tiny light

subtitles.original: 君の歌姫になれたら いいな
subtitles.english: I hope I can become your diva

subtitles.original: Dancing Reed / 作詞・作曲・編曲：アオワイファイ
subtitles.english: [Song: Dancing Reed / Lyrics, Composition, Arrangement: Aowai-fai]

subtitles.original: okey dokey返事はいいけど 冗談なら笑えないよ
subtitles.english: Okey-dokey, your reply is fine, but if it's a joke, it's not funny

subtitles.original: 渋態曖昧どっちを向いちゃうの 蜃気楼に手を伸ばした
subtitles.english: Congested and vague, which way are you turning? I reached my hand out to the mirage

subtitles.original: 微熱のような夢物語
subtitles.english: A daydream like a slight fever

subtitles.original: そんな光は見ない振りしていた
subtitles.english: I pretended not to see that kind of light

subtitles.original: ざわめく鼓動まだ行かないで
subtitles.english: My fluttering heartbeat, please don't fade away yet

subtitles.original: 幻じゃ嫌だよ 私を奪って
subtitles.english: I don't want it to be an illusion, sweep me away

subtitles.original: 魅惑のdancing dancing night
subtitles.english: A captivating dancing, dancing night

subtitles.original: 拡がって収まんないuniverse
subtitles.english: An expanding, uncontrollable universe

subtitles.original: 君の表情は私の森羅万象を
subtitles.english: Your expression completely rewrites

subtitles.original: 書き換えちゃうかも責任重大ね
subtitles.english: my whole universe, you hold a heavy responsibility

subtitles.original: 一切合切
subtitles.english: Everything, absolutely everything

subtitles.original: dance dance dance we are dancing reed
subtitles.english: Dance, dance, dance, we are dancing reed

subtitles.original: 夢中になって絡み合ったゼログラビティ
subtitles.english: Falling head over heels in this entangled zero gravity

subtitles.original: 構わず dance dance dance
subtitles.english: Without a care, dance, dance, dance

subtitles.original: just a dance just a dance
subtitles.english: Just a dance, just a dance

subtitles.original: 声は闇に預けたまま
subtitles.english: With our voices left to the darkness

subtitles.original: 目を覚ましても離れないで
subtitles.english: Even when I wake up, please don't leave me

subtitles.original: maybe needy正気じゃないのよ
subtitles.english: Maybe needy, I'm not in my right mind

subtitles.original: 体温が忘れられない
subtitles.english: I can't forget your warmth

subtitles.original: 誰彼そんなじゃないから
subtitles.english: I'm not like this with just anyone

subtitles.original: 独り占めしてeuphoria
subtitles.english: Keeping this euphoria all to myself

subtitles.original: 気にしてない様な言葉は装飾で
subtitles.english: My words pretending not to care are just decorations

subtitles.original: メイクの様には流せない
subtitles.english: They can't be washed away like makeup

subtitles.original: 360°偽りだって
subtitles.english: Even if it's 360 degrees of lies

subtitles.original: 隠しきれぬような
subtitles.english: And I can't completely hide them

subtitles.original: 私に構って嬉しいなんて crazy crazy love
subtitles.english: Being happy that you notice me is a crazy, crazy love

subtitles.original: 摩天楼から連れさらって
subtitles.english: Sweep me away from this skyscraper

subtitles.original: 君の表情は私の深層心理を
subtitles.english: Your expression completely alters

subtitles.original: すり替えちゃうのよ責任重大ね
subtitles.english: my deepest feelings, you hold a heavy responsibility

subtitles.original: 過ぎ去ったネオン 残像shooting star

subtitles.original: グライダーみたいに漂えば
subtitles.english: If I drifted like a glider

subtitles.original: 幸も不幸もなかった
subtitles.english: there would be neither happiness nor unhappiness

subtitles.original: 指先でまた君を探している
subtitles.english: With my fingertips, I'm searching for you again

subtitles.english: Let me hear your voice

subtitles.original: 私に構って 教えてよ恋の先を！
subtitles.english: Notice me, and tell me what lies beyond love!

subtitles.english: An expanding, uncontrollable universe

subtitles.english: Your existence has stepped

subtitles.original: 踏み込んだのよ付き合ってよね
subtitles.english: into my future, so stay with me, okay?

subtitles.english: Everything, absolutely everything

subtitles.english: With our voices left to the darkness

subtitles.original: 目を覚ましても離れないで
subtitles.english: Even when I wake up, please don't leave me

subtitles.original: みんなー！今日は誕生日ライブに来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Everyone! Thank you so much for coming to my birthday live stream today!

subtitles.original: きゃー！コメントも見えてるよー！
subtitles.english: Kyaa! I can see your comments too!

subtitles.original: 最初に聴いてもらったのが「Diva」「Dancing Reed」でした！
subtitles.english: The first two songs you heard were 'Diva' and 'Dancing Reed'!

subtitles.original: えー、この二つの曲は、あのフェスと、あと去年のね、ドラマの主題歌に使わせて...
subtitles.english: Um, these two songs were used for that festival, and also as the theme songs for last year's drama...

subtitles.original: 使っていただいた曲で、すごく思い出に残っているので...
subtitles.english: ...and they hold really special memories for me,

subtitles.original: 最初に二曲歌ってみようかなと思って選びました！
subtitles.english: so I chose them to perform as the first two songs!

subtitles.original: そして、今回はですね、ときのそらお披露目誕生日...
subtitles.english: And this time, it's 'Tokino Sora 3D Showcase & Birthday...'

subtitles.original: 2026！「ときのそらお」じゃないよ、ときのそらだよ！って
subtitles.english: 2026! It's not 'Tokino Sorao,' it's Tokino Sora! Haha,
